title: Senior Teacher - IIT Kharagpur - Growth Opportunity

jsonLd.title: Senior Teacher - IIT Kharagpur - Growth Opportunity
jsonLd.description:
IIT Kharagpur, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Senior Teacher for our Meerut operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About IIT Kharagpur:
IIT Kharagpur is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in Data Analysis

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Flexible working hours
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Meerut, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with IIT Kharagpur!
